creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I can't reproduce it, see here: http://people.freebsd.org/~mezz/sawfish.txt 

Are you sure, you have everything at latest version? You should update your 
ports tree, try to reinstall librep, and try it again. While I am here, please 
follow this: http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
